meta.name: S-Coin Comment Templates - Impactful Malaysian Social Style 200x2
meta.description: 400 unique customer-editable S-Coin review helper templates: 200 earn comments and 200 redeem comments. Written in casual, natural Malaysian social media style with slightly longer and more impactful wording.
meta.recommended_use: Use as starting points for real customers to edit based on their actual shopping and S-Coin experience.

earn: {item}
{price}
{percent}
{netValue}
redeem: {item}
{points}
{value}

notes: Earn comments mention item, price, S-Coin cashback percent, and net S-Coin value.
Redeem comments mention item, S-Coin used, and redemption value.
Avoid adding RM before {price}, {netValue}, or {value} in the app if those values are already formatted with RM.
Designed for the existing Review Helper app structure using external scoin_comments.json.
